title: frame
description: One increment of streaming-view data. seq is monotonically increasing per view_id starting at 1; hosts can use seq to detect gaps or reorder if the transport admits reorderings. payload shape is owned by the view kind (declared in the preceding stream_begin).

payload.description: Kind-specific extend payload. Schema owned by producer/renderer pair (e.g. ode_trajectory: {t: number, y: number[]}).
